description: Automated application deployments using Jenkins and GitHub Actions, reducing manual overhead.
Containerized legacy and modern web applications using Docker and orchestrated development workspaces.
Configured NGINX reverse proxies for load balancing, routing, and SSL termination.
Built resilient, high-speed CI/CD pipelines for Next.js (frontend) and Django (backend) applications.
Managed multi-cloud environments (AWS, Azure) and shared hosting architectures.
Administered and optimized PostgreSQL database servers for staging and production loads.
Provisioned, configured, and managed AWS cloud infrastructure including EC2, RDS, S3, and Lambda functions.
Engineered automated CI/CD pipelines to streamline code delivery to production environments.
Collaborated closely with software development teams to optimize application designs for cloud-native deployment.
Implemented elastic AWS Auto-Scaling groups and Application Load Balancers (ALB) to handle traffic surges.
Deployed and configured Prometheus and Grafana monitoring stacks to track cluster health and application metrics.
